name: Black Tie Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp + 1 t. Black Caviar, Rinsed And Drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine yogurt and mayonnaise in a small bowl.
2. Add onion powder to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least one hour.
4. Arrange tomato halves on lettuce-lined plates.
5. Top each tomato half with 1 tablespoon of the yogurt mixture and 1/2 teaspoon of black caviar.
(Fat 1.7. Chol 15.)
